value.found_quote:
Route Agent Runtime traffic through Agent Gateway
Learn how to route Agent Runtime traffic through Agent Gateway for secure and governed connectivity.
value.rationale: The page explicitly mentions "Agent Gateway" and describes it as a way to "route Agent Runtime traffic through Agent Gateway for secure and governed connectivity," which directly matches the claim. The page also has a dedicated "Agent Gateway" section under "Govern" in the navigation, with sub-pages including "Agent Gateway overview," "Set up an Agent Gateway," and "Monitor Agent Gateway traffic." The page is marked as "Preview" at the top, indicating the feature is in pre-GA status.
